visual_summary: A responsive hero section with a title, description, and ad component that can be used to showcase a main message or announcement on a page.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready hero component with the following characteristics: Name: BaseHero Description: A responsive hero section with a title, description, and ad component that can be used to showcase a main message or announcement on a page. Style: responsive, default, simple Interactions: Tags: hero, announcement, main-message Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // src/components/BaseHero.astro --- import BaseAd from './BaseAd.astro' interface Props { title: string description: string } const { title, description } = Astro.props ---

{title}

{description}
